title: Move Health Network Navigation Bar Down by 2 Inches

requirements.summary: Add approximately 192px (2 inches) of top padding to the Navigation component wrapper on the HealthNetworkLanding page to move the navigation bar downward
acceptanceCriteria: The navigation bar on the Health Network landing page appears approximately 2 inches lower than its previous position
The navigation bar remains fully visible and functional after the positional change
No other pages are affected by this positional change

file_operations.description: Add a wrapper div around the Navigation component with top padding of approximately 192px (2 inches) to push the navigation bar downward. This wrapper should only apply to the HealthNetworkLanding page and not affect Navigation's appearance on other pages. Ensure the padding is applied in a way that maintains the navigation's sticky positioning and functionality.
